title: Low Optimized
description: the modpack is aimed to improve your FPS using multiple mods including Sodium.
body: **Low-Optimized** is a meticulously crafted Minecraft modpack designed with a singular focus: to deliver an immersive gameplay experience while prioritizing performance on low-end computers. With this modpack, players can dive into the vibrant world of Minecraft without worrying about hardware limitations holding them back.
